choices.label: Haggle
choices.text: You squeeze a few dollars out of the moment.

choices.label: Move On
choices.text: You leave the clerk alone.

choices.label: Ask Routes
choices.text: You get a cleaner read on nearby gambling rooms.

choices.label: Keep Quiet
choices.text: You avoid becoming memorable.

start_summary: Pick up the parking lot note.

choices.label: Follow Tip
choices.text: A riskier route opens up.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: You stick with safer routes.

start_summary: A host is holding an invitation.

payload.summary: A host offers Grand Casino access.

choices.label: Accept Invitation
choices.text: Take the card and open the boss-floor route.

messages: The Grand Casino is open to you.

choices.label: Not Yet
choices.text: Leave the card with the host until you are ready.

messages: The host keeps the invitation ready.

payload.summary: Rourke scouts the room before returning home.

choices.label: Read His Route
choices.text: You watch which noise pulls Rourke across the room and learn when to disappear.

choices.label: Flash the Edge
choices.text: You let Rourke catch one polished move. He files your face away for later.

choices.label: Play it cool
choices.text: You make yourself seem ordinary.

choices.label: Brush Off
choices.text: They remember your face.

payload.summary: The trio takes five by your table.

choices.label: Tip Solo
choices.text: You buy the chorus and the sax player points your luck at the next hand.

choices.label: Ask Room
choices.text: The cellist names a quieter room with serious tables.

choices.label: Listen
choices.text: You keep quiet and the room forgets to watch you.

payload.summary: A regular knows which doors matter.

choices.label: Buy Name
choices.text: You buy the table's next drink and get a real introduction.

choices.label: Soft Talk
choices.text: You let them talk while you become less interesting.

choices.label: Overshare
choices.text: The wrong person hears you fishing for the room.

choices.label: Take Shades
choices.text: She hands over cheap dark glasses that still sell the part.

choices.label: Take Address
choices.text: You take the address and keep your cash in your pocket.

choices.label: Decline
choices.text: You smile, pass, and let the invite vanish without heat.

choices.label: Take Cash
choices.text: You take a small finder fee instead.

choices.label: Walk Away
choices.text: You keep your hands clean.

choices.label: Borrow cash
choices.text: You take emergency cash and a name you may regret.

choices.label: Refuse
choices.text: You keep your night quiet.

choices.label: Blend In
choices.text: You let the noise cover your next move.

choices.label: Needle
choices.text: You bait a scene and lose subtlety.

choices.label: Wait
choices.text: You cool off and lose momentum.

choices.label: Push
choices.text: You keep playing through the attention.

choices.label: Cheap Route
choices.text: You learn a safer shop stop.

choices.label: Dark Route
choices.text: You hear about the back alley circuit.

payload.summary: Seek out the cruel and unusual.

choices.label: Remember the warning
choices.text: You commit Dave's words to memory.

story_log.message: Dave said: Seek out the cruel and unusual.

choices.label: Slip Out
choices.text: You leave carefully.

choices.label: Rush
choices.text: You move fast and look guilty.

choices.label: Lay Low
choices.text: You sit out and let attention pass.

choices.label: Act Natural
choices.text: You keep moving chips like nothing happened.

choices.label: Take Comp
choices.text: You take the drink and become more memorable.

choices.label: Decline
choices.text: You keep distance from the host.

choices.label: Change Table
choices.text: You pay for a reset and drift to another game.

choices.label: Press Anyway
choices.text: You press the streak while watched.

choices.label: Finish One
choices.text: You get one last action before the room shuts down.

choices.label: Slip them cash
choices.text: The inspector pockets the bill and remembers your face.

choices.label: Pay Again
choices.text: You pay the second squeeze and keep the room calm.

choices.label: Refuse
choices.text: He shuts it down after your next action.

choices.label: Play Through
choices.text: You ride the shoe while the pit watches everyone.

choices.label: Tip Him Off
choices.text: You warn him with a chip tap. He owes you.

choices.label: Drop Word
choices.text: You point the pit his way and look clean.

choices.label: Take Signal
choices.text: You take the count and cash a small edge.

choices.label: Wave Off
choices.text: You keep distance and bank the goodwill.

choices.label: Shrug
choices.text: You play through the cold looks.

choices.label: Buy Round
choices.text: You spend a little and soften the room.

choices.label: Accept
choices.text: You drink it and let luck get louder.

choices.label: Refuse
choices.text: The host smiles thinly and clocks the refusal.

choices.label: Coffee Swap
choices.text: You pour coffee from your Thermos and keep the host happy.

choices.label: Pay Now
choices.text: You peel off cash and buy quiet.

choices.label: Promise
choices.text: You talk him into one more stop.

choices.label: Stand Ground
choices.text: You try to stare him down before the room notices.

choices.label: Position
choices.text: You move where the handoff helps most.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: You keep playing and catch only part of the lull.

choices.label: Move
choices.text: You use the dark for one unwatched action.

choices.label: Freeze
choices.text: You keep your hands still and look boring.

choices.label: Stand Still
choices.text: You let the count wash over you and eat the attention.

choices.label: Buy Confusion
choices.text: You tip the runner and blur the count.

choices.label: Tail
choices.text: You ride the distraction for a fast score.

choices.label: Fade
choices.text: You let the whale draw eyes away from you.

choices.label: Tip Dealer
choices.text: You pay for the rhythm and lower attention.

choices.label: Save Cash
choices.text: You keep the money and accept the smaller opening.

choices.label: Sit Out
choices.text: You buy time and let the heat breathe out.

choices.label: Keep Moving
choices.text: You keep momentum and risk the looks.

choices.label: Pay
choices.text: You pay and the floor forgets a few details.

choices.label: Walk Past
choices.text: You keep your cash and your profile.

choices.label: Press
choices.text: You push the streak and make noise.

choices.label: Pocket
choices.text: You pocket the story before it owns you.

choices.label: Run Package
choices.text: You do the favor on their schedule.

choices.label: Refuse
choices.text: You refuse and convert goodwill into trouble.

payload.success_message: Linda issues the Gold Players Card and lets you leave with your winnings. The card opens quieter rooms; your name is on the list.

choices.label: Accept Gold Card
choices.text: You sign Linda's slip and leave with your winnings.

choices.label: Wait
choices.text: You stay on the floor instead of claiming the card.

payload.success_message: Rourke cannot prove enough to hold you. The casino lets you walk with your winnings. Rourke lets the elevator close; the house will remember your face.
payload.failure_message: The story falls apart in the back room. The casino takes you out back and the run ends.

trash_flavors.message: The planter swallows it under black leaves.
A service bin carries it off the floor.
The washroom cistern takes it without a sound.

choices.label: Crew: {item}
choices.text: The Crew holds {item} outside.

choices.label: Trash: {item}
choices.text: Lose {item} before the search.

choices.label: Keep Everything
choices.text: Carry everything through Rourke's door.

tier_messages.clean: The pat-down finds nothing worth Rourke's time.
tier_messages.minor: One crooked tool lands on Rourke's desk.
tier_messages.serious: The search strips your kit and the terms harden.
tier_messages.blatant: The search finds a loaded cheating kit. Rourke ends the meeting before cards reach the table.

pat_down.blatant_failure_message: Rourke finds a loaded cheating kit. The casino takes you out back before the game begins.

evidence.text: I watched that move under my own lights.
The floor logged an edge in your hands.
My floor kept writing your name down.
Your {open_debt_count} open markers explain the pressure.
Your hands put the drinks at {drunk_level}.
We met before you reached my floor.
Linda closed her ledger when your edge showed.
The ledger shows {games_played} settled clean games.
Linda still put her name beside yours.
The Crew already carried part of your story.
Your heat reached {heat} before this door.
The cage has your run at {net_winnings} net.
Every one of your {games_played} games is logged.

choices.label: Hold Steady
choices.text: Let the run record answer.

choices.label: Name Your People
choices.text: Put Linda and the Crew between the claims.

choices.label: Take the Edge
choices.text: Risk one fresh tell under Rourke's stare.

edge_catalog.label: Call the Swap
edge_catalog.tell: His thumb stays under the down card.

barks.intro: Sit down. Five hands. Then the door decides.
barks.deal: Read the felt, not my face.
barks.player_win: One hand. The house is still here.
barks.rourke_win: That is what the room does to a story.
barks.caught_edge: Good eye. The hand plays straight.
barks.false_call: Wrong tell. Pay for the noise.

choices.label: Enter Back Room
choices.text: Rourke leads you off the floor.

choices.label: Make the Call
choices.text: You dial from memory and wait through the rings.

trigger_event.failure_message: No answer. The phone is still there for next time.

failure_story_log.message: No answer from the family line.

choices.label: Not Tonight
choices.text: You leave the receiver in its cradle.
choices.consequence_summary: No debt and no family strings.

choices.label: Accept
choices.text: He wires the cash and reminds you this is family, not charity.

choices.label: Deny
choices.text: You thank him and hang up before the lecture gets its shoes on.
choices.consequence_summary: No loan; family remembers the call.

story_log.message: You turned down the family loan.

choices.label: Play Dumb
choices.text: You miss the count on purpose.

choices.label: Trade Count
choices.text: You trade a small edge and become memorable.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: The count dies in the noise.

payload.summary: A regular pushes a lucky number.

choices.label: Take Number
choices.text: You pocket the superstition.

choices.label: Buy Story
choices.text: You buy the story a drink and cool the table.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: The wheel keeps its own counsel.

payload.summary: An off-duty dealer reads the shoe.

choices.label: Hear Pattern
choices.text: You take the rhythm and keep your face still.

choices.label: Tip Dealer
choices.text: You pay for discretion.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: You let the shoe talk alone.

payload.summary: A neighbor points at your holds.

choices.label: Accept Tip
choices.text: You take the hold advice.

choices.label: Swap Seat
choices.text: You move and lose the stare.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: The machine hums louder.

payload.summary: A braggart wants a loud side bet.

choices.label: Side Bet
choices.text: You take the small money and the attention.

choices.label: Laugh Off
choices.text: You make the table laugh at him instead.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: The dice keep rolling.

payload.summary: A local knows which jar is light.

choices.label: Take Tip
choices.text: You take the jar read.

choices.label: Buy Coffee
choices.text: You buy the local's quiet.

choices.label: Ignore
choices.text: The stack stays mysterious.

payload.summary: Floor staff asks for a slower night.

choices.label: Play Cool
choices.text: You slow your rhythm and let the floor breathe.

choices.label: Buy Round
choices.text: You buy noise for the rail and lose the stare.

choices.label: Talk Back
choices.text: You make a point and make a memory.

payload.summary: The pit boss squeezes the table.

choices.text: You leave the table before the look hardens.

choices.label: Bluff
choices.text: You sell the win as noise and manners.

start_summary: A regular makes room at the bar.

payload.summary: The regular asks what brought you to town.

choices.label: Keep It Light
choices.text: Say you are only looking for a friendly game.

choices.label: Ask About the Action
choices.text: Ask where a careful player might find a bigger room.

start_summary: A host waits with a cream-colored card.

payload.summary: The card bears the Grand Casino crest.

choices.label: Accept the Invitation
choices.text: Take the card and thank the host.

messages: The Grand Casino is open to you.
